title: Volila 15M Kraft Wrapping Paper Roll, Brown Craft Paper with Reindeer Design for Eco-Friendly Christmas Gifts (43cm Wide)
features: KRAFT WRAPPING PAPER - The Christmas Wrapping Paper Roll is manufactured on a roll to give you a larger size of 15m x 43cm with 90GSM thickness. The Roll of Kraft is perfect for craft wrapping presents for xmas, gifts and Christmas presents.
REINDEER - The xmas craft wrapping paper has a reindeer design on the brown paper roll. The Christmas wrapping paper themed design of Reindeers gives a holiday touch to your presents and gifts.

LARGE SIZE - The Christmas Paper comes on a 15m roll, and is 43cm wide. We have included xmas twine inside of the brown paper roll - don't forget to check! Everything is included for your brown wrapping paper bundle for customizable gifts and presents.
KRAFT PAPER ROLL - Brown Packaging Paper is an eco friendly alternative to use this Christmas. With recyclable paper and organic jute string to tie your presents and gifts this festive this season.
WARRANTY - Should you encounter any concerns with your Wrapping Paper Roll or issues with your item, don't hesitate to reach out to us. Your peace of mind is our promise!
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Explore volila's Range of Kraft Wrapping Paper Rolls Brown Add To Basket Santa Claus Add To Basket Blue Snowflakes Add To Basket Elk Add To Basket Blue Star Add To Basket Polka Dots Add To Basket Snowflakes Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 524 4.7 out of 5 stars 524 4.7 out of 5 stars 524 4.7 out of 5 stars 524 4.7 out of 5 stars 524 4.7 out of 5 stars 524 4.7 out of 5 stars 524 Price £10.99 £ 10 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £10.99 £ 10 . 99 £8.99 £ 8 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £8.99 £ 8 . 99 Dimensions 43cm x 15m 43cm x 15m 43cm x 15m 43cm x 15m 43cm x 15m 43cm x 15m 43cm x 15m Recyclable ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Premium Quality ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Versatile ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Includes Red & Brown Twines ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ What is Kraft wrapping paper? Kraft wrapping paper is a strong and durable paper made from at least 80% sulphate wood pulp, known for its ability to withstand industrial pressures. How long and wide is each roll of kraft wrapping paper? Each roll measures 15 meters in length and 43 centimetres in width. Does the wrapping paper come with any accessories? Yes, it comes with red and brown jute strings, which add a decorative touch to your wrapping. Can this wrapping paper be used for purposes other than gift wrapping? Yes, volila Kraft Wrapping Paper can also be used for arts and crafts, parcel packing, as void fillers, and even as a protective cover for tables and floors. How should I store this wrapping paper roll? Store it in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight to maintain its quality and prevent premature aging.
